user.title: Add a GitHub repository
user.description: Enter a personal access token and the repository to track.

data_description.access_token: A GitHub personal access token. A fine-grained or classic token with public read access raises the rate limit to 5000 requests per hour.
data_description.repository: The repository to track, in the owner/name format (for example home-assistant/core).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate GitHub Insights
reauth_confirm.description: The token for {repository} is no longer valid. Enter a new access token.

error.invalid_auth: The access token is invalid or lacks the required scopes.
error.invalid_repository: The repository must use the owner/name format.
error.repo_not_found: The repository could not be found with this token.
error.rate_limit: The GitHub API rate limit is exhausted. Try again later.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the GitHub API.

init.title: GitHub Insights options
init.description: Adjust how often the repository metrics are refreshed.

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the GitHub API, in minutes. The minimum is 1 minute.
